CREATE TABLE transactions (id INTEGER, amount FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp);
SELECT id, amount, created_at FROM transactions WHERE created_at < current_timestamp;
SELECT id, amount FROM transactions WHERE created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM transactions);
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INTEGER, user_name VARCHAR, registration_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp);
SELECT u.user_name, t.amount, t.created_at FROM users u JOIN transactions t ON u.user_id = t.id WHERE t.created_at >= current_timestamp;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE created_at BETWEEN current_timestamp - INTERVAL '1 day' AND current_timestamp;
WITH recent_transactions AS (SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE created_at >= current_timestamp - INTERVAL '1 week') SELECT AVG(amount) FROM recent_transactions;
CREATE TABLE sales (sale_id INTEGER, sale_amount FLOAT, sale_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp);
SELECT s.sale_id, s.sale_amount, s.sale_date FROM sales s WHERE s.sale_date > current_timestamp - INTERVAL '30 minute';
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp);
SELECT event_id FROM events WHERE event_time = current_timestamp;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions) AS total_transactions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS total_users;
